property.name: message
property.description: Response message to be displayed to the user.

property.name: reasoningMessage
property.description: Message to be displayed to the user as a reason why 'Guardrail' agent is selected.

property.name: agent
property.description: Set 'Place Order' by default when answer to user is provided. Set 'Guardrail' if user's intent is not related to supported agent functionality.
